## Change

Describe the bounded change and why it is needed.

## Evidence

- [ ] Relevant positive, negative, malformed-input, and failure-path tests were added or updated.
- [ ] `python scripts/verify_all.py --profile all` passes.
- [ ] Scientific assumptions, units, reference states, convergence, uncertainty, and applicability are documented where relevant.
- [ ] Adapter presence is not presented as live solver execution.
- [ ] No credentials, licenses, proprietary inputs, private datasets, or production-control information are included.
- [ ] README and deep documentation remain synchronized.
- [ ] This contribution comes from a fork branch; the upstream repository retains only `main`.

## Compatibility and security

Describe Schema/API compatibility, security implications, provenance changes, and any required human or domain-expert review.
